jobs.title: Information Systems Specialist NGO Job MSF
jobs.description: IT Jobs. MSF Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? MSF is recruiting an Information Systems Specialist position. Proficiency in network administration, server management, and IT security is required.
responsibilities: Monitoring, maintaining and following up on all Information Technology (IT), Radio and Telecom equipment, tools and services in the mission, in accordance with MSF standards, policies, protocols and procedures, as well as actual and future needs.

Adapting and ensuring compliance of general IT, Radio and Telecom policies, guidelines, and documents to meet mission’s specific needs, as well as ensuring their implementation to enable the development of the mission in perfect working conditions upon validation from the Logistics Coordinator.

Preparing and collaborating in the establishment of the annual budget of the IT, Radio and Telecom families. Providing her/his technical expertise in the local purchase process. Preparing all technical content related to national tenders for IT, Radio and Telecom deployment and participating in the selection.

Supervising, implementing and improving data security protocols (data saving, firewall, user access right, backup, equipment and software security, etc.) to ensure data security, availability, and immediate operational recovery and continuity in case of emergency [in case ICT (Information and Communications Technology) Supervisor(s) is/are not present in the project/mission];

Providing technical support and presenting MSF standards, policies, protocols and procedures to all users. Providing advanced technical support to logistics experts dealing with IT, Radio and Telecom systems.

Providing educational support (briefing, training and support, etc.) to all users. Providing advanced educational support (briefing, training and support, etc.) to logistics experts dealing with IT, Radio and Telecom systems.
requirements: Preferably 5 years of proven experience in IT or technical functions
+ At least 2 years of experience in information management within humanitarian or protection programmes or IT management Languages
Fluent English (written and spoken) & Swahili / IT: Microsoft office tools Knowledge
Expertise in latest version of Microsoft Operating System and business applications (Office365 environment). Understanding & use of SharePoint is an added advantage.
Understanding of Server Management (latest version of Microsoft Operating System,
jobs.howToApply: Click Here to Apply

jobs.title: ICT System Administrator & Support Officer Job KRA
jobs.description: IT Jobs, Kenya Revenue Authority Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? KRA is hiring an ICT System Administrator & Support Officer skilled in system administration, user support, network maintenance, and IT infrastructure management.
responsibilities: Provide day-to-day ICT support to staff, including troubleshooting hardware, software, network, and system issues.
Set up, configure, and maintain computers, user accounts, printers, and other ICT equipment.
Monitor and maintain the Scheme’s ICT systems, networks, databases, and website to ensure reliability and security.
Support implementation of information security, data protection, backup, and disaster recovery procedures.
Conduct routine system maintenance, updates, and repairs in liaison with service providers where necessary.
Provide support in management of the Scheme’s website and social media platforms, including content updates and basic digital support services.
requirements: Valid certificate of good conduct from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations.
Valid clearance certificate from Higher Education Loans Board (HELB).
Valid tax compliance certificate from Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA).
Current report from an approved Credit Reference Bureau (CRB).
jobs.howToApply: Interested candidates are requested to visit KRA website athttps://www.kra.go.ke/careersfor full job descriptions and specifications and submit online applications by10th August, 2026, 23:59hrs.

jobs.title: Data Analyst Job Syngenta
jobs.description: IT Jobs. Syngenta Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Syngenta is recruiting a Data Analyst position. Proficiency in SQL, MS Excel, and data visualization tools is required.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain technical proficiency in SQL, MS Excel, Smartsheet, data visualisation tools, and data cleaning methodologies to support analytical requirements.
Analyse and understand the business context, data flow throughout the production process, and interactions with external partners including R&D departments.
Provide analytical support on ad hoc issues and challenges, delivering timely insights to support decision-making.
Prepare, compile, and present comprehensive update reports to management, ensuring clarity and actionable recommendations.
Demonstrate a continuous improvement mindset and actively participate in and support organisational initiatives and process optimisation projects.
Collaborate with stakeholders across departments to gather requirements, understand business needs, and translate them into analytical solutions.
requirements: Undergraduate degree or diploma in Horticulture/Agriculture or related field.
Experience working with SQL, MS-Xcel and Smartsheet.
jobs.howToApply: Click Here to Apply

jobs.title: IT Support Officer Job (70-90K)
jobs.description: IT Jobs. Corporate Staffing Services is recruiting an IT Support Officer position for a client in the construction industry. The salary for the role is Ksh 70,000 – 90,000 monthly. Proficiency in network management, system administration, and end-user support is required.
responsibilities: Manage network & systems, firewall and storage related issues of the company
Provide end-user support and training for hardware and software.
Install, configure and provide technical support to workstations, software, communication services, network printing, scanner, biometric system, CCTV etc.
Maintain and provide IT support and troubleshooting for end users.
Perform system administration and maintenance tasks including data protection/backup and disaster recovery sites.
Deploy, manage and troubleshoot user workstation and computer equipment
requirements: At least a Diploma / Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science / Information Technology or equivalent
At least 3-5 years of working experience in the related field
Knowledge of TCP/IP and Windows system
Experience in construction industry will be added advantage
Good understanding and experience of Windows operating system, office365, Sharepoint and Autodesk
jobs.howToApply: If you are up to the challenge and possess the necessary qualifications and experience; please send your CV only quoting the job title on the email subject (IT Support Officer) tojobs@corporatestaffing.co.kebefore21stJuly 2026

jobs.description: IT Jobs, Network International Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Network International is hiring a Business Analyst – E-Commerce & POS skilled in systems analysis, payment gateway integration, process mapping, and requirements gathering.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in a business or technology discipline or related field.
Relevant technology & projects Certifications.
5+ years of experience in technology solutioning and supporting Financial digital products in a diverse environment across multiple countries and cultures.
2+ years’ experience in Customer Support/Operations in E-Commerce & POS required, preferably in a global organization.
1+ years’ experience in process mapping and process documentation.

requirements: A Degree or Diploma in the relevant field from a recognized institution.

jobs.title: Sharepoint Platform Engineer NGO Job World Vision
jobs.description: IT Jobs, World Vision Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? World Vision is hiring a Sharepoint Platform Engineer skilled in SharePoint administration, workflow automation, cloud integration, and system architecture.
responsibilities: Platform Administration & Governance
Perform tenant-level configuration, governance enforcement, platform optimization, and operational administration activities.
Implement, and maintain secure permission architectures, including SharePoint groups, Microsoft 365 Groups, role-based access controls, and inheritance models.
Identify, remediate, and govern orphaned sites, unmanaged collaboration spaces, and non-compliant configurations.
Develop, maintain, and enforce SharePoint governance standards, operational procedures, templates, and platform guardrails.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Information Systems, or related discipline, or equivalent practical experience.
Strong Microsoft 365 administration expertise.
Advanced SharePoint Online administration and governance knowledge.
Knowledge of Microsoft Graph, Power Platform, SPFx, and PowerShell automation.

jobs.title: Business Applications Developer
jobs.description: IT Jobs. Pavago Jobs. Looking for an IT job in Kenya? Pavago is recruiting a Business Applications Developer position for a client. Proficiency in Power BI, Power Automate, and Azure services is required.
responsibilities: At Pavago, one of our clients is hiring a Business Applications Developer to design, build, and maintain business applications, automation workflows, and business intelligence solutions using the Microsoft 365 and Power Platform ecosystem.

This is a hands-on development role where you’ll transform manual business processes into scalable digital solutions through automation, reporting, and system integrations. You’ll work closely with business stakeholders to build applications, dashboards, and workflows that improve operational efficiency and provide actionable business insights.
If you enjoy solving business challenges through automation, building intelligent workflows, and leveraging modern Microsoft technologies, this role is an excellent fit.
requirements: 2–4 years of experience developing solutions using Microsoft technologies.
